note: M12c (F5) — horizontal projection. config CENTERX/CENTERY/PROJECTION (derived: VIEW_W//2 etc.; FOV90 -> focal=CENTERX). tables.viewangletox_table (shared R6: view-relative fine angle -> screen column; FOV-90 perspective col=CENTERX-tan(angle)*PROJECTION; front-FOV half-table trig_n//2; clamped [-1,VIEW_W+1]). reference_model.angle_to_x = lookup at (angle+ANG90)>>angle_shift. The wall scale uses finesine (no runtime tangent LUT; tan folded into the build-time table).
also: tightened test_config resolution-leak guard (CENTERX=VIEW_W//2=160 at W=320 false-positived the blanket check; now by-name, stronger)
